title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions:
Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions!
